data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of tiered rewards, specifically that 3 referrals yield $10, 10 yield $50, and 25 yield VIP status. However, the evidence only confirms that Sarah receives a $25 account credit after 1 referral, with no mention of the tiered structure or rewards for 3, 10, or 25 referrals. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the tiered rewards system as outlined in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of tiered rewards being implemented as specified.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
